summary: Client Fee feature testing completed successfully. All 12 test cases passed. Backend APIs correctly handle client_fee field, Commission dashboard shows 4 client fee cards, Reports page has 4 tabs, Analytics Commission tab shows Total Client Fees in summary.
seed_data_creation: Test case created with client_fee=750 (TEST_Lender) for backend testing - was cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Client Fee feature fully implemented and tested. Existing data: Test Client case with client_fee=500, proc_fee=1500, commission_percentage=35. The Commission dashboard shows 4 client fee cards (Total Client Fees, Total Commission + Client Fees, Client Fees This Month, Client Fees Last 30 Days). Reports page has 4 tabs (Cases Completed, Commission, Client Fees, Commission + Fees). Analytics Commission tab shows 6 summary cards including Total Client Fees.

test_results.test_2_post_cases_client_fee: PASS - POST /api/cases stores and returns client_fee field correctly
test_results.test_3_dashboard_forecast: PASS - GET /api/dashboard/forecast returns total_client_fees, commission_this_month.client_fees, commission_last_30_days.client_fees
test_results.test_6_reports_client_fees: PASS - GET /api/reports/commission-paid with report_type=client_fees returns total_client_fees in summary
test_results.test_7_reports_both: PASS - GET /api/reports/commission-paid with report_type=both returns total_combined_revenue in summary
test_results.test_8_case_detail_client_fee: PASS - CaseDetail page shows Client Fee input in edit mode (data-testid='client-fee-input') and displays value in read mode
test_results.test_9_commission_dashboard_cards: PASS - Commission dashboard has 4 client fee cards: total-client-fees, total-commission-and-fees, client-fees-this-month, client-fees-last-30
test_results.test_10_reports_page_tabs: PASS - Reports page has 4 tabs: Cases Completed, Commission, Client Fees, Commission + Fees (data-testid: report-cases-tab, report-commission-tab, report-client-fees-tab, report-both-tab)
test_results.test_11_analytics_commission_tab: PASS - Analytics Commission Analytics tab shows Total Client Fees (£500) in summary stats
test_results.test_12_new_case_client_fee: PASS - New Case form has Client Fee field in commission section (data-testid='case-client-fee')
